MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, James F. Blanding is present.
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendant, Juan Carlos Gonzalez , is present.
Attorney, Michael Monayla, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Kooroshi Afghari, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-03-2010 is vacated.
